TECH_LEVELS.T1: Bronze/Iron Age (Metallurgy, Early Empires, Basic Chemistry)
TECH_LEVELS.T2: Pre-Industrial (Printing Press, Gunpowder Weapons, Early Science)
TECH_LEVELS.T3: Industrial Age (Steam Power, Mass Production, Electrical Generators)
TECH_LEVELS.T4: Atomic Age (Fission Power, Early Computing, Chemical Rockets)
TECH_LEVELS.T5: Information Age (Global Networks, Orbital Stations, Basic AI)
TECH_LEVELS.T6: System Colonization (Fusion Power, Interplanetary Travel, Basic Lasers)
TECH_LEVELS.T7: Early AI Governance (System-Wide Automation, Advanced Fusion, Plasma Weapons)
TECH_LEVELS.T8: Prototype FTL (Gravitic Waveguides, Basic Field Projectors, Unstable Wormholes)
TECH_LEVELS.T9: Basic Interstellar (Early Dark Energy Taps, Limited Wormhole Stabilization)
TECH_LEVELS.T10: Improved FTL Drives (Increased Wormhole Range & Stability)
TECH_LEVELS.T11: Basic Shield Modulation (Early Shield Slide/Release Techniques)
TECH_LEVELS.T12: Established Interstellar (Federation-Scale Travel, Matter Printers, Basic Terraforming)
TECH_LEVELS.T14: Advanced Shield Control (Traction Control & G-Force Compensation)
TECH_LEVELS.T15: Advanced Interstellar (Anti-Matter Power, Basic Megastructures, Advanced AI)
TECH_LEVELS.T16: Early Megastructure Engineering (Habitat Rings, Asteroid Mining Networks)
TECH_LEVELS.T18: Early Sector Control (AI-Assisted Governance, Advanced Plasma/Disruptor Weapons)
TECH_LEVELS.T20: Sector-Wide Infrastructure (Advanced Field Projectors, Stable Wormhole Networks)
TECH_LEVELS.T22: Advanced Matter Printing (Complex Alloy & Biological Printing)
TECH_LEVELS.T25: Quantum Singularity Power (Mass Accelerators, Early Matter Manipulation)
TECH_LEVELS.T28: Dyson Swarms & Advanced AI (Sentient AI, Early Stellar Harvesting)
TECH_LEVELS.T30: Arm-Scale Civilization (Advanced Megastructures, Weather Control, Dark Matter Scoops)
TECH_LEVELS.T32: Advanced Stellar Engineering (Star Lifting, Artificial Star Creation)
TECH_LEVELS.T35: Stellar Engineering (Dark Matter Power, Wormhole Network Mastery, Basic Stellar Lifting)
TECH_LEVELS.T38: Zero-Point Energy (Localized Reality Anchors, Advanced Matter Manipulation)
TECH_LEVELS.T39: Causality Manipulation (Localized Time Dilation, Probability Fields)
TECH_LEVELS.T40: Transcendent (Protomatter Extraction, Localized Reality Warping, First-Tier Relic Tech)
